Tips & Tricks

Startup Repair Commands for Windows

A quick reference for running recovery commands from the Windows repair environment.

Click on Advanced Option > Troubleshoot > Advanced Option > Command Prompt.

Run these commands one by one:

chkdsk
sfc /scannow
bootrec /fixmbr
bootrec /rebuildbcd
exit

After that, click on Continue. Your system should reboot automatically.
